overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior walking through a rainy Japanese temple complex. The character enters through a wooden gate, crosses the stone courtyard passing a five-story pagoda, and enters the main hall to reveal an interior sanctuary with golden Buddha statues.

events.description: exits the covered gate structure into the open temple courtyard
emerges from gate shadow into the storm-lit open courtyard

agents.ego_description: samurai warrior walking steadily through the temple gate into the rainy courtyard

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near the inner courtyard entrance

entered.detail: large traditional wooden temple gate with curved roof tiles and dark timber beams
wet stone tiles reflecting the heavy rain
tall dense bamboo trees surrounding the temple complex

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a large wooden temple gate, transitioning from the sheltered entrance into the open courtyard. Rain falls heavily on the stone pathway as the character moves toward the inner temple grounds, with bamboo groves visible in the background.

events.description: character turns slightly right while walking toward the pagoda
five-story pagoda becomes prominent in the center of view

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy courtyard, passing stone lanterns and circling the pagoda

notable_agents.action: temple monk standing still near a stone lantern

entered.detail: tall dark wooden pagoda with tiered curved roofs and hanging lanterns
traditional stone lanterns lining the wet pathway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open courtyard, the samurai approaches and passes a majestic five-story pagoda. Stone lanterns line the pathway while rain continues to fall, and traditional temple buildings flank the sides of the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: main temple hall approach with stone stairs

events.description: approaching the main temple entrance with stone steps
entering the shadow of the main temple building facade

agents.ego_description: walking up the moss-covered stone steps toward the main temple hall entrance

entered.detail: large wooden temple building with green tiled roof and lit entrance
moss-covered stone steps leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the pagoda behind, the samurai approaches the main temple hall. The character ascends the stone stairs toward the dark wooden entrance, moving from the open courtyard into the shadow of the building's overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple sanctuary with golden Buddha statues

events.description: enters the dark interior of the temple sanctuary
candlelight illuminates golden Buddha statues in the darkness

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the sanctuary, observing the Buddha statues and altar arrangements

notable_agents.action: temple priest standing near the central altar
worshippers sitting on cushions in prayer

entered.detail: large golden Buddha statues flanking the central altar with ornate halos
lit candles and lanterns providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple sanctuary, the scene shifts to a dark interior lit by candlelight. Golden Buddha statues dominate the altar area while wooden pillars support the high ceiling. A priest stands near the altar and worshippers sit in prayer as the samurai explores the sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched outdoor temple complex into the serene, candlelit sanctuary of a main hall. It begins as a samurai passes through a large wooden gate, moving from the sheltered entrance into an open stone courtyard where heavy rain falls against a backdrop of bamboo groves. As the character advances, the camera tracks past a majestic five-story pagoda and stone lanterns before turning toward the main temple hall. The scene then shifts from the open, wet courtyard to the shadow of a wooden overhang as the samurai ascends stone stairs and enters the building. Finally, the environment transforms into a dark interior illuminated by candlelight, revealing golden Buddha statues and worshippers gathered beneath high wooden pillars.
